treatment_information.treatment_response: Decreased breath sounds at the bases bilaterally; right greater than left.

treatment_timeline.event: Chest tube placed to drain fluid in lungs.
IVC filter placed due to bilateral subsegmental PE.
Treat for enterobacter UTI, discharged on Cipro.
Repeat echocardiograms showed pericardial effusion stable in size.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up appointments made for the patient.
